{{nihongo|'''Ohotarashihimeno- Shrine'''|大帯姫廟神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotarashihimeno- Shrine'''|大帯姫廟神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotarashihimeno- Shrine'''|大帯姫廟神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotarashihimeno- Shrine'''|大帯姫廟神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 大帯姫廟神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Ohotarashihimeno- Shrine'''|大帯姫廟神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Ohotarashihimeno- Shrine'''|大帯姫廟神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotarashihimeno- Shrine'''|大帯姫廟神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotarashihimeno- Shrine'''|大帯姫廟神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohotarashihimeno- Shrine'''|大帯姫廟神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
